name: Team DSCC
subject: Trump: "I need you guys to step up and overwhelm them"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
You need to read this, friend: Politico reports Trump is lining up GOP billionaires to fund Senate fights in 2018, and we need all hands on deck to stop him. You need to read this, friend: Politico reports Trump is lining up GOP billionaires to fund Senate fights in 2018, and we need all hands on deck to stop him.
---
[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/support-democrats?refcode=DPE-20170312-TeamDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
Friend --

You need to read this.

_Politico_ reported that at a closed-door event, Donald Trump asked a room full of billionaires to deliver him a **filibuster-proof super-majority Senate in 2018.**

Trump even took the time to walk these billionaires through each of the 10 states he won that have Democratic Senators up for re-election next year.

Now, we don't know exactly how many zeros these mega-donors added to their donation checks -- or what other events Trump has planned to go after Senate Democrats.

But we do know that it's up to _this_ grassroots team to fight back.

**[Can we count on you to help? Pitch in $1 to help make sure that Trump never has a filibuster-proof Senate.](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/support-democrats?refcode=DPE-20170312-TeamDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

It's tough enough to stop Trump's agenda with Republican control of the House and Senate. But it would be virtually impossible to stop him if the Republicans reach 60 votes in the Senate next year.

And as Senate Democrats do more and more to stand up to Trump, winning the 2018 election will become his obsession.

That's where you come in, friend. Because the DSCC is the only committee that's 100% dedicated to electing Democratic senators, your contribution plays a vital role in stopping Trump from getting a filibuster-proof Senate.

But we've got our work cut out for us. Democrats have to defend 25 seats in 2018, and with Trump lining up GOP billionaires to fund Senate fights, we need all hands on deck to stop him.

**[Will you chip in $1 right now?](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/support-democrats?refcode=DPE-20170312-TeamDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

Thank you,
Team DSCC

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e39f/2b07114c/5baf5bf6/736bf82e/2521840667/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e39f/2b07114c/5baf5bf6/736bf829/2521840667/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e39f/2b07114c/5baf5bf6/736bf828/2521840667/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). name: The White House
subject: Your 1600 Daily
body:
Everything White House for 3/13/2017. |

**WHITE HOUSE MEMO:**
Today, President Trump will meet with victims of Obamacare -- individuals, businesses, and others negatively impacted by the law. In addition, the President will meet with his Cabinet for the Trump Administration's first Cabinet meeting.

**GET INVOLVED**
* The President supports Congress's plan to repeal and replace Obamacare.
[Support the Repeal and Replacement of Obamacare: Sign the Petition.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a13ea024dcc0177fac82091a0ca9e01670069c1baa3813178a6fa1191726c5ea55c4a099cfc194401fce468a30a8b75bba0929824ad694f5)

**FROM PRESIDENT TRUMP**
[](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a13ea024dcc0177f5dce9b8db7ed04b761a895acd079ac5e09fbb59ea498a41cd9e82b543469e8e096a0db1b51ece9612585c4d9dc54fb23)

[ ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a13ea024dcc0177f966fb852579afe28857c6224ed04c4d21b8bd9781af83738dd80beda5cc565def4b8de42b136a9d752a559cf82e9eeac)

**OVAL OFFICE HIGHLIGHTS**
* President Trump leads a healthcare discussion with key House Committee Chairmen.
[Read More](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a13ea024dcc0177fb2a42b692a005542bca5c80f19db2368df1721f271215e80354f4334e9ba68d47aee9703f28957cb900a450b415810c6)
* President Trump delivers his Weekly Address discussing the repeal and replacement of Obamacare.
[ ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a13ea024dcc0177fbd0e9834adee25ac3692d752cd8550345634397a235fba6e5729bfede802962aedd17c584e83c4ddf0aca5534972834f)

**WHITE HOUSE UPDATES**
**Photo of the Day:**

President Trump meets with students from Saint Andrew Catholic School.
[View Photo](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a7a9aaff35422aba1a77b648b6f4286f6758c59e376c0f1117936477219939e515d6e3d3dff9df5b8b45eef2ff848aa4f08aee51a20ad9d9)

* President Trump's First 50 Days of Action: Achieving Results for the American People
[Read More](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a7a9aaff35422aba96d7c6332cf3f0b8312b4c3557f74552348ee632ea15315ac2de50ee30e9769cd9cd5bc4783bdc782f6e0b017c871cb0)
* Three-Pronged Approach to Repeal and Replace Obamacare
[Read More](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a7a9aaff35422aba810cf1804fef9bb7ab832cf2c70f6da9ed3c5f36fb349363ced0b155b64c469f6ac7d133b18ee1fc2b44956eb6694e0a)

[ ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a7a9aaff35422aba8fba082a185f27933c87c0381d48811708a0bba8932ffef566af6d6a5b0a2f7904e866198f3d8336a30c2c451f0cd63a)

**PRESS ROOM**
* Watch Friday's press briefing [here.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a7a9aaff35422abaff8615716df5aa8e6039127aa68b5d457c1fd21a39b1a1122700a2de4f2b1596b04216c3e22a9759f5b3dd95e1ad7b7d)
* _"#Obamacare is a disaster. It's time to #RepealAndReplace"_[Retweet.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a7a9aaff35422aba42b08f41c0373c0a3ef18c2d7301792bf7807c730ac575ffd26aa54bf4dd3cfa8567aa8d175249078374f4ed991fe84a)
* Today's press briefing will take place at 1:00 P.M. EST in the White House Briefing Room with Press Secretary Sean Spicer. Watch it [here.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a7a9aaff35422abacf22775d867e47d59de4b6c339aed0c6ba87947aa222f241b15a16732040e5d6b96ef1ed391922ffb5627a1217e00292)

**PRESIDENT TRUMP'S SCHEDULE**
* 10:30AM: President Trump receives his daily intelligence briefing
* 11:00AM: President Trump leads a listening session on healthcare
* 12:30PM: President Trump has lunch with Vice President Mike Pence and Secretary of Transportation Elaine Chao
* 3:00PM: President Trump meets with his Cabinet
* 4:30PM: President Trump signs an Executive Order entitled "Comprehensive Plan for Reorganizing the Executive Branch"
* 6:30PM: President Trump has dinner with Secretary of State Rex Tillerson and National Security Advisor H.R. McMaster

**NEWS REPORTS**
* _New York Post:_ "Obama admin spent $77M to hype ObamaCare in 2016"
[Read More](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a7a9aaff35422aba2e42a7629fe1255921c6bd9500a6ab6b03dffbf2fc6024ddd7a5789f719f668914199c6e13327012035a71437246fe0c)
* _The Washington Post:_ "The American Health Care Act is A Good Start"
[Read More](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a7a9aaff35422aba98c0e5207f948f8eb6ec622599d623f91f6c1ca9fe22863161ead35bd7531637992747d2008cf71b008205523ca7d8ed)
* _Washington Examiner:_ "Bar Association Rates Gorsuch 'Well-Qualified' To Serve On The Supreme Court"
[Read More](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a7a9aaff35422aba3c78dfb547f42ee00e1f4979eaa1119682096d08403d3c176378af90177e6c7b64d8d7037da92edab556a777bd50facd)

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a7a9aaff35422abaeececef11ed7611704fc2784a987e08b7d84a2cbd398af33c57e2103e3b0f244462c7719338ed8e101174809d22f014d) [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a7a9aaff35422aba93f0542eff6e3c0767e94f951f0016249cc37cd043a66483ce7b882cbbf58ae6970e1fa6edfaa18e1efd9bee1dd1c9f8)[Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d43e63019afa79a01a8227797d4e7059d26df2108af449e986fb2d5625ddc6ad137f2790dcfc1dfcd3322568932381234b)

body:
Democrats still won’t approve our full cabinet. |

Friend, Six weeks ago, our team asked you to sign a petition telling Democrats to stop obstructing the approval of our cabinet... They STILL haven’t approved it. No president’s cabinet in history has faced the same obstructionism as ours. Now the only thing that can stop their obstructionism is YOU. Democrats were elected to the Senate to work for you -- the American voter. And now they need to hear from millions of American voters across the country that it’s time to stop obstructing us and to get to work. Add your name to our Official Petition to tell Democrats to stop obstructing our America First Agenda. We can’t let the Democrats get away with obstructing the will of the AMERICAN PEOPLE. We need our full cabinet in place to fully implement our agenda to Make America Great Again! This isn’t even about party politics. It’s about doing what’s RIGHT for the American people. Now please sign our Official Petition telling Democrats to stop obstructing our America First agenda. Thanks, Donald J. Trump President of the United States

But we need your help. | MAKE SURE JILL HAS THE FUNDS NEEDED TO GET HER MESSAGE TO VOTERS | | | == | Jill will not be a passive lieutenant governor - she'll fight for deregulation, the roll-back of burdensome taxes as well as the overall economic prosperity of Virginia. And she's on a mission to make sure every Virginian in the Commonwealth knows her vision for growth. Remember when Virginia had one of the strongest economies in the nation? Well, after years of an expanding and overreaching government - we're now rated 48th in growth. It's time for Virginia to embrace a change. Every dollar donated counts, and as her campaign manager I see how hard she's working, and I know if we have the resources to get our message out - JILL WILL WIN IN NOVEMBER. | == | Thanks for your support, Pat Trueman Campaign Manager | | | Paid for and Authorized by Vogel for Virginia45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100Warrenton, VA 20186 | Follow Jill on Facebook and Twitter for Campaign Updates == == | | | Vogel for Virginia | 45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100, Warrenton, VA 20186 | | Sent by mailto:info@vogelforvirginia.com in collaboration with |

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Fix it, don't break it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
---
Derek,

I have serious concerns with the Republican plan to repeal the Affordable Care Act, which will reduce the number of Americans with health insurance and raise health care costs for patients. As I feared, this bill puts party interests over the interests of the American people.

Behind the numbers -- including the millions who'd be uninsured as a result of a repeal -- are real people. Real families. The ACA is not perfect but this new bill creates more problems rather than improving our health care system.

Republicans had _seven years_ to put together a replacement plan for the ACA, but now they're insisting on rushing to pass this bill without taking the time to analyze the cost and impact on the American people.

**[Will you stand with me to tell Republicans to fix our health care system rather than break it?](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=p4Ji8%2FT6EMPqbJQ3iL4IBsJXHTcV%2F6%2FV)**

I've spent the last month meeting with hundreds of Virginians who would be negatively impacted by an ACA repeal. I'd love to give them peace of mind and tell them that they'll still be able to afford health insurance and that premiums won't skyrocket -- but Republicans' new health care proposal will do nothing but leave hardworking families out in the cold, and potentially destroy our health care industry by removing millions of healthy citizens from the insurance markets.

For years, I've supported bipartisan improvements to the ACA and am happy to sit down at the table with anyone, from either party, who wants to work to improve our health care system. **But I will not support a plan that dismantles Medicaid, raises costs for Virginia 's middle class families and seniors, and defunds Planned Parenthood while massively cutting taxes for the wealthy.** We cannot walk back the years of progress we have already made to ensure that every American has access to quality, affordable care.

**Let 's stand together and tell them: [Fix our health care, don't break it.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=iOMo2lju4H8PqxjL%2BCofrc%2BghwpCiPz3)**

Thanks,
Tim
| [**DONATE**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=%2BmjxenHyechI8KaftX5XUM%2BghwpCiPz3)
---
| Paid for by Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=oenLvL4JFjI3FApfHDsFA8%2BghwpCiPz3).
---

name: The White House
subject: Share Your Obamacare Disaster Story
body:
President Trump wants to know your Obamacare story. Share today: |
[](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ba29d83ae0fbbf55756c322e101aa763236122337e6cbb9082ecbb820fd44d77c96deb6587da0ef18605b5f04d8ccefb2fee5f72959d4475)

Obamacare has been a **_complete failure_** since the beginning, and things are only getting worse.

Today, President Donald J. Trump held a listening session to hear directly from Americans who have experienced significant hardship as a result of Obamacare's poor coverage and rising prices.

President Trump wants to hear from hard-working Americans like you. How has Obamacare affected you? **[Share your Obamacare disaster story.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ba29d83ae0fbbf551c47b2ee1b464ddcacb82dff91149f47e37deb9d200cbf8db4cded3f07f796467a458a3cb41ae09c3cb3927eca245416)**
[](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ba29d83ae0fbbf55756c322e101aa763236122337e6cbb9082ecbb820fd44d77c96deb6587da0ef18605b5f04d8ccefb2fee5f72959d4475)
During the meeting, one woman revealed that she had her health insurance **cancelled three times** since Obamacare became law. Another attendee had her insurance jump from $17,000 a year to a devastating $52,500 a year for her struggling family, while yet another said her health insurance now costs more than her mortgage.

Obamacare came packaged as the healthcare solution for all Americans. Instead, the country was given hundreds of pages of broken promises.

Millions of hard-working Americans have been impaired by soaring costs, cancelled plans, and overbearing mandates. As one of those innocent Americans, President Trump wants to hear **_your story_** about how this disastrous law has affected you and your family.

**[Share Your Story](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ba29d83ae0fbbf55756c322e101aa763236122337e6cbb9082ecbb820fd44d77c96deb6587da0ef18605b5f04d8ccefb2fee5f72959d4475)**

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ba29d83ae0fbbf5591113495bda414197c0c43fdb2988630e8d33c0580ede4e8fcd469e9165df0001a58745c9d8b917738da31cfdb6ffbd7) [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ba29d83ae0fbbf5554638bc56794bcd242b4c79f2cb8040b72cc85c0639252d2fc03ba269358e6db7880b5668717b40e60443fb3f15bb204)[Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d44869803717288de16ff0cbbb17e0196f1125b619b566c0871d631e1c332d744e4e669e01a3227041f7185981f42f7d61)

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Stop-the-GOP-Bill1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170313_tp_nd&source=em_20170313_tp_nd")**

Some were turned away at our borders or detained for hours -- sometimes without food and water, or access to their families or attorneys. Others, including some with lawful visas, worried that if they left the country, they would be unable to return.

**Trump's own advisors admit that his new Muslim ban is virtually the same as the old one. It goes against everything we are as Americans, and it must be stopped:**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/No-Muslim-Ban1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170313_tp_nd&source=em_20170313_tp_nd")**

We already know that our intelligence community believes Vladimir Putin ordered interference in our election to help Trump win. **The big question is: what is Putin getting in return? The American people deserve answers:**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Investigate-Trump-and-Russia1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=14+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170313_tp_nd&source=em_20170313_tp_nd")**
**[Demand Trump release his tax returns.](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Trump-Tax-Returns1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=15+-+Demand+Trump+release+his+tax+returns&utm_campaign=em_20170313_tp_nd&source=em_20170313_tp_nd")** Every president in modern history has released his tax returns so the American people could see for ourselves that the president was operating in the country's best interest, not his own financial interest. Donald Trump won't. Is he hiding more Russian ties? Shady business dealings that use the power of the presidency to make himself rich? Maybe he just hasn't paid any taxes for years. **There's only one way to know for sure:**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Trump-Tax-Returns1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=16+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170313_tp_nd&source=em_20170313_tp_nd")**

And you'll be making sure that when we speak out against Trump and the GOP -- whether it's on health care, or the Muslim ban, or Trump's own shady behavior -- we're shouting with one united voice.

Thanks for everything you do.

Tom

Tom Tom Perez Chair Democratic National Committee Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: OurRevolution.com
subject: Rally in DC to Save Our Care
body:
Join us for the last leg of this nationwide tour to show
#
Sisters and Brothers,
While Republicans have scrambled to advance their half-baked health care bill, the National Save My Care Bus Tour has traveled 14,000 miles across America, holding 45 rallies in 22 states along the way. Our Revolution is proud to partner with Save My Care for the final stop of their tour on Capitol Hill, one day before the Koch brothers rally to cut 30 million off insurance rolls and cut taxes for the top 1%. [**Join us for the last leg of this nationwide tour to show Washington just how important health care is to you.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a50/43f17890/deb1b1cb/620007b4/269087671/VEsH/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/save-my-care-rsvp?source=em170313-dc")
[**Save My Care Rally**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a50/43f17890/deb1b1cb/620007b4/269087671/VEsE/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/save-my-care-rsvp?source=em170313-dc")
Upper Senate Park
200 New Jersey Ave NW, Washington, DC 20001
Tuesday, March 14, 10:00AM - 12:30PM EDT
**[RSVP TO ATTEND»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a50/43f17890/deb1b1cb/620007b4/269087671/VEsF/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/save-my-care-rsvp?source=em170313-dc")**
Patients, nurses, doctors and other health care advocates from across the country are coming to Washington to champion the millions of people who have gained insurance, lifesaving treatment and preventative care through the Affordable Care Act. Grassroots leaders have altered the national discourse by telling the story of the ACA - and our rally this Tuesday marks the beginning of its next chapter. Thirty million Americans are at risk of losing their health insurance under Trumpcare. **We will protect our health care.**
[**Attend the Save My Care Rally to demand that Donald Trump, the Koch brothers and Congress keep their hands off our health care.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a50/43f17890/deb1b1cb/620007b4/269087671/VEsC/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/save-my-care-rsvp?source=em170313-dc")
Together, we can guarantee health care as a right of all people.
In solidarity,
The Team at Our Revolution

subject: We need to get your opposition on the record, friend [right now]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
We've now had a few days to read (and re-read) every line of the Republican plan to repeal the Affordable Care Act.
---
[](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e39a/2b07114c/5bb8c970/736be562/728641345/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trumpcare?source=DPE-20170313-Myers-ProsHV&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=")
Friend --

We've now had a few days to read (and re-read) every line of the Republican plan to repeal the Affordable Care Act.

The headlines are terrifying:

* _CNN_ : Republican Health Care Plan "Will Likely Leave Millions Uninsured, Experts Said."
* _New York Times_ : "Millions Risk Losing Health Insurance in Republican Plan, Analysts Say."
* _Vox_ : "Analysis: GOP plan to cost Obamacare enrollees $1,542 more a year."

**This first round of analysis makes it clear: the elderly, families wrestling with drug abuse, and women will suffer the most.**

**[We need to get your opposition on the record, friend [right now]. Join Senate Democrats to oppose the repeal of the Affordable Care Act.](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e39a/2b07114c/5bb8c970/736be562/728641345/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trumpcare?source=DPE-20170313-Myers-ProsHV&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=")**

Older Americans would pay as much as five times more for insurance under the GOP proposal. The AARP estimates that some seniors would be looking at an "eye-popping" $8,400 hike under this plan.

Experts are saying that the Republican Plan would "gut opioid treatment gains" and "wreak havoc on efforts to...stop the prescription drug and opioid epidemic." Their proposal jeopardizes drug abuse treatment program for nearly 63,000 Pennsylvanians, nearly 200,000 Floridians, nearly 28,000 Missourians, and millions more.

And of course, the Republican plan would defund Planned Parenthood - jeopardizing access to vital and lifesaving healthcare services for millions of women and working families across the country.

**[Senate Democrats won't stand by while the Republicans rip away health care from millions of people. Sign on with them to oppose the repeal of the Affordable Care Act.](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e39a/2b07114c/5bb8c970/736be562/728641345/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trumpcare?source=DPE-20170313-Myers-ProsHV&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=")**

So if millions would lose health coverage, seniors would see their prices spike, and women would lose access to vital coverage, who does this plan actually help?

**The rich and powerful, of course.**

The Republican plan cuts taxes for the rich -- and 90 percent of the benefit would go to the top 1 percent of earners. The insurance industry, in particular, would get a new tax break on salaries above $500,000.

In fact, part of the reason the GOP is pushing to move forward with repeal so quickly is because they want less time spent analyzing this sickening proposal and more time focusing on an even-bigger set of tax cuts before the summer.

Senate Democrats are doing everything they can to stop it- but they need your help. Don't let this bill move forward without making your voice heard. Speak out right now:

**[https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trumpcare](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e39a/2b07114c/5bb8c970/736be562/728641345/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trumpcare?source=DPE-20170313-Myers-ProsHV&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=")**

Thank you,

Mindy Myers
DSCC Executive Director

**A quick note on contributions, friend:**

The fight ahead on health care is going to be a tough one. Already, the GOP is targeting multiple Senate Democrats with aggressive ad campaigns to support this sham of a health care replacement. 99% of our contributions come from donors giving $200 or less, so when we say we're depending on grassroots donors, we mean it. We don't have the Koch brothers in our corner, but we do have you. We hope you'll pitch today to help Senate Democrats in the fights ahead.

[**Contribute**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-20170313-Myers-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e39a/2b07114c/5bb8c970/736be55c/728641345/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e39a/2b07114c/5bb8c970/736be55f/728641345/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e39a/2b07114c/5bb8c970/736be55e/728641345/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). name: Roy Cooper
subject: My speech tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
As governor, I'm focusing on making the people of North Carolina better educated, healthier, and better off. I hope you'll stand with me.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202e31/2fde7c66/4389405e/156916a4/4130792361/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/170313-cooper-sots?utm_campaign=em17_170313_sots_fnd_gq_ful__rc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em17_170313_sots_fnd_gq_ful__rc&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
---
Friends, Tonight, I gave my first State of the State address. In my speech, I talked about my optimism for North Carolina. Our universities and community colleges, our farms and factories, our Research Triangle Park, our banking headquarters, and -- most of all -- the hardworking people here make North Carolina a state of promise and opportunity. **[Although I'm optimistic, I know we have some tough choices to make. As governor, I'm focusing on making the people of North Carolina better educated, healthier, and better off. I hope you'll stand with me.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202e31/2fde7c66/4389405e/156916a4/4130792361/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/170313-cooper-sots?utm_campaign=em17_170313_sots_fnd_gq_ful__rc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em17_170313_sots_fnd_gq_ful__rc&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")** As I said tonight, there are steps we can take now that will improve the life of many North Carolinians. Partisan battles, power struggles and lawsuits might grab the headlines, but we have to find common ground when we can. Improving education is an area where we all can agree. With the right investment, we can make North Carolina a top ten educated state. Let's work together to get more money in the pockets of North Carolina families by bringing more good-paying jobs to our state.
